creator: ari@stonepile.fi
text:
After amavisd-new was updated to 2.11.0 dkim signing for originating messages
stopped working. There is no signature in headers, no error either.

A fix is suggested here:

https://groups.google.com/forum/#!topic/mailing.unix.amavis-user/19timozmF5M

I tried that, it seems to work.
